refactor_items.title: Run teach-impeccable to establish project design context
refactor_items.description: FR-3 requires teach-impeccable to be run before any impeccable audit pass. No .impeccable.md or equivalent config file exists. Run the teach-impeccable skill to generate the project design context file and commit it to the repository so future impeccable passes use project-specific guidelines.

refactor_items.title: Add aria-valuemin and aria-valuemax to progressbar element
refactor_items.description: The role='progressbar' element in ChatBubble.tsx has aria-valuenow but is missing aria-valuemin={0} and aria-valuemax={100}. ARIA 1.1 recommends all three attributes for screen-reader compatibility. Add both attributes to the progress bar div.

refactor_items.title: Add explicit aria-live='polite' to chat messages container
refactor_items.description: The chat messages container uses role='log' which has implicit aria-live='polite' per ARIA spec. Adding an explicit aria-live='polite' attribute improves cross-reader compatibility without any functional change.

refactor_items.title: Document distill skill rejection decisions
refactor_items.description: FR-2 requires that rejections of skill recommendations are noted. The distill pass (US-002) was completed but no artifact documents which recommendations were reviewed and which were declined. Create a brief distill review note in .agents/flow/ to satisfy FR-2.
